title: Boat with Companion Cube - Portal
description: Replace chests in boats with companion cubes.
body:
# Boat with Companion Cube
![Boats with Companion Cubes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2440ca59ca9f6ad355d00c4df35dee661376ba8.png)
This resource pack replaces chests in boats with companion cubes.
### Version:
Supports all versions of Minecraft that have boats with chests (from **1.19** to **1.21.4**)
### Requirements:
None! Just have Minecraft: Java Edition and you're good to go. You **don't need optifine**.
### FAQ:
**Are cubes safe?** Absolutely! They may threaten to stab you, but don't listen to them, they won't.
Don't worry <3
